name: Pramod Rao
body: Pramod served as Executive Director of SEBI until 2025, handling corporation finance and debt markets, with board roles at IFSCA, NFRA, and IICA. Earlier he was Group General Counsel at ICICI Bank and General Counsel for Citi South Asia. A lawyer, strategic advisor, and mentor, he has long championed innovation in how India resolves disputes.
